metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace

properties.description: A single source contacts more than 50 distinct destination ports on a host within the window (Network Service Discovery). Tune the port threshold to your environment's vulnerability scanners.
properties.query: CommonSecurityLog | where DeviceVendor has 'Cisco' or DeviceProduct has 'Meraki' | summarize DistinctPorts=dcount(DestinationPort), Ports=make_set(DestinationPort,100) by SourceIP, DestinationIP, bin(TimeGenerated,1h) | where DistinctPorts > 50
